svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="ChatGPT" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="arch2" name="Pro Architecture"> <mxGraphModel dx="2981" dy="864" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1800" pageHeight="1200" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="bg1" parent="1" style="swimlane;rounded=1;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#cccccc;fontStyle=1;" value="Couche Client" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="180" x="90" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c1" parent="bg1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;" value="Navigateur<br>Desktop / Mobile" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="140" x="20" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bg2" parent="1" style="swimlane;rounded=1;html=1;fillColor=#f5fff5;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;" value="Frontend -&nbsp;React 18 + Vite" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="760" x="-200" y="230" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="f1" parent="bg2" style="rounded=1;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;" value="React 18 SPA" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" x="30" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="f2" parent="bg2" style="rounded=1;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="Vite Build System" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="220" x="270" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bg3" parent="1" style="swimlane;rounded=1;html=1;fillColor=#fff8e8;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontStyle=1;" value="Backend - NestJS" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="260" width="790" x="-215" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b1" parent="bg3" style="rounded=1;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="Guards &amp; Pipes<br>JWT Guard + class-validator" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="240" x="30" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b2" parent="bg3" style="rounded=1;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="REST Controllers
Auth / Files / Users" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="240" x="290" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b3" parent="bg3" style="rounded=1;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Services<br>AuthService + FileService" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="210" x="550" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b4" parent="bg3" style="rounded=1;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="Upload · validation · stockage<br>Multer Interceptor" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="300" x="460" y="155" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b5" parent="bg3" style="rounded=1;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="Scheduler<br>@nestjs/schedule (Cron)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="330" x="30" y="155" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bg4" parent="1" style="swimlane;rounded=1;html=1;fillColor=#f7f7ff;strokeColor=#9999cc;fontStyle=1;" value="Data & Infrastructure" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="140" width="680" x="-160" y="710" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d1" parent="bg4" style="shape=cylinder;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="PostgreSQL" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="140" x="60" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d3" parent="bg4" style="shape=cloud;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Object Storage
Local FS / AWS S3" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="190" x="460" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d2" parent="bg4" style="shape=cylinder;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="Redis Cache" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="140" x="260" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="bg1" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeWidth=2;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" target="bg2" value="HTTPS"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="230" y="310" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="bg2" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeWidth=2;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="bg3" value="REST / JSON"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="bg3" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeWidth=2;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" target="bg4" value="ORM"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="f3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="Router / Axios / TailwindCSS" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" x="320" y="255" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
